headline: UiPath's Debt-Free Balance Sheet Fuels Strategic Flexibility
summary: PATH's debt-free balance sheet and $1.47B cash reserve give it unique flexibility to invest boldly in automation growth.

headline: A Look At ServiceNow (NOW) Valuation After Analyst Upgrade And New AI Partnerships
summary: ServiceNow (NOW) is back in focus after an analyst upgrade to Outperform coincided with new AI partnerships that expand its sales reach and address AI reliability, giving investors more to assess around the stock’s recent move. See our latest analysis for ServiceNow. Despite the recent analyst upgrade and AI partnerships, the stock’s 30 day share price return of 6.95% comes after a 27.07% decline over 90 days and a 31.28% drop in 1 year total shareholder return. This suggests rebuilding...

headline: Salesforce: AI Is Not The Problem, Architecture Is
summary: While Salesforce has mitigated SaaSpocalypse risks via Anthropic, its Frankenstein architecture creates a heavy Integration Tax that slows client ROI.

headline: Nvidia's Huang pitches AI tokens on top of salary as agents reshape how humans work
summary: Most enterprise AI projects have failed since 2018, a sobering track record for an industry awash in enthusiasm.
